jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Lenskart
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lenskart family as a SEO Specialist in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
